description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Check Markdown links that runs on push to devel and docs/new-website branches and on pull requests to devel. The workflow should cancel in-progress runs if a newer run is started on a given PR, except for refs containing devel or release/. Use an ubuntu-22.04 job that checks out the repository, sets up the environment, generates Doxygen and CMake docs, and checks Markdown links using a quiet mode configuration from a specified JSON file.
